name: diet
description: Suggests nutritionally-equivalent, affordable, locally-available Indian substitutes for prescribed meal-plan ingredients, respecting dietary preferences and medical safety (pregnancy, diabetes).

skills.name: Indian ingredient substitution
skills.description: Swap expensive or unavailable ingredients for affordable local Indian alternatives with matched nutrition.
examples: I can't find quinoa or avocado, and chia seeds are too expensive
Suggest a local substitute for kale, I'm vegetarian
My dietician prescribed a tofu and almond milk smoothie but I'm on a budget
Swap these for pregnancy-safe Indian options
